user.title: Samsung Frame Art Rotator
user.description: Set up the Immich share and Samsung Frame connection.

data.client_name: Stable client identifier (do not change after first connection)

error.invalid_immich_share: Could not reach the Immich share. Check the URL and that the share is still active.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This share URL + frame host is already configured.

init.title: Samsung Frame Art Rotator settings
init.description: Runtime settings (applied without re-creating the integration).

data.enabled: Master switch — turn off to pause all rotations
data.disable_sensor: Disable the TV's ambient-light sensor (keeps brightness fixed)
data.motion_timeout_minutes: Minutes without motion before the TV goes into standby
